title: Eurycaulis crocatus
taxonomy: Eurycaulis crocatus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae. It belongs to the genus Eurycaulis and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is known to be a hemiparasitic species, obtaining some of its nutritional needs from the roots of other plants. Its classification is further supported by its unique characteristics and growth habits. Through its classification, Eurycaulis crocatus is identified as a distinct species within the Santalaceae family.
